## Описание варианта / Variant description
Describe the new RPA archive format you've encountered.

## Заголовок файла / File header
Paste the first line of the .rpa file here. It should look like:
```
RPA-X.X 0000000000000000 XXXXXXXX
```

## Игра / Game name
Which game is using this format? (Optional)

## Дополнительная информация / Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots here.
